channel.title: Web on z-r0crypt
channel.description: Recent content in Web on z-r0crypt

item.title: Dangerous PHP Functions: Code Execution and Exploitation Reference
item.description: Complete reference of PHP functions exploitable for RCE, LFI, information disclosure and filesystem manipulation. Includes grep and semgrep patterns for source code review, PHP version notes, and exploitation context for OSWE/AWAE.

item.title: OSWE/AWAE Preparation: Complete Study Guide
item.description: Complete OSWE/AWAE preparation guide from someone who passed in 2020. Curated resources by vulnerability class, exam strategy, and what actually matters for the 48-hour exam.
